title: Environment, Society & Sustainability Minor Dissertation
outline: Students register in the first semester of the second year and complete a suitable research proposal in consultation with an appropriate supervisor. After approval of the proposal, students undertake a research project demonstrating the application of theory to practical issues in environment, society and sustainability. The work must be submitted in the form of a minor dissertation early in the second year.
assessment: The minor dissertation must be presented for formal examination. Coursework and minor dissertation each count 50% towards the degree; each must be passed separately for the award of the degree.
